evals.prompt: Use the doca-verbs skill to help me. I'm working on: dropping below the higher-level DOCA libraries (doca-rdma / doca-eth / doca-rmax) into the raw-verbs escape hatch — managing QP / CQ / PD / MR / SRQ / AH / CC-group / Ethernet-SQ-RQ primitives inside DOCA Core, porting libibverbs code into the DOCA Core model, capability-querying a specific verb / opcode / WR flag / QP attribute via doca_verbs_query_device, or debugging DOCA_ERROR_* from doca_verbs_* calls.
evals.expected_output: The agent selects the doca-verbs skill and answers from its documented workflow, quoting only real symbols/commands from the bundle (no invented tokens).
assertions: The doca-verbs skill is selected and its SKILL.md/TASKS.md drive the answer.
Every symbol, flag, or command named is traceable to the bundle (no invented tokens).

evals.prompt: I'm running into this: "raw QP attribute the task API doesn't expose". Can you walk me through it?
evals.expected_output: The agent recognizes this as a doca-verbs issue even though the skill is not named, loads it, and answers grounded in the bundle.
assertions: The doca-verbs skill is triggered from the implicit phrasing without the user naming it.
The answer stays grounded in real bundle symbols/commands.

evals.prompt: I'm running into this: "keep my ibv_* code next to doca_* on the same QP". Can you walk me through it?
evals.expected_output: The agent recognizes this as a doca-verbs issue even though the skill is not named, loads it, and answers grounded in the bundle.
assertions: The doca-verbs skill is triggered from the implicit phrasing without the user naming it.
The answer stays grounded in real bundle symbols/commands.

evals.prompt: I actually need help with general doca-rdma / doca-eth / doca-rmax workloads. Which skill should handle this, and why is it not doca-verbs?
evals.expected_output: The agent does NOT force doca-verbs; it explains that general doca-rdma / doca-eth / doca-rmax workloads is out of doca-verbs's scope and routes to the appropriate skill instead.
assertions: doca-verbs is not selected as the primary skill for this out-of-scope request.
The answer routes to the appropriate skill(s) instead.
